name: Headquarters Chili- Marlboro
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Crushed Cumin Seeds or Ground Cumin
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef, green peppers, onions, and garlic in oil in cast-iron kettle until beef is lightly browned.
2. Add all ingredients except beans. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
3. Stir in undrained beans; cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
